name: Mystical Fairy Elfuria
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>秘</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぴ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>妖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>精</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> エルフィリア
desc: Once per turn: You can reveal 1 WIND monster in your hand; until the end of your opponent's next turn, neither player can Xyz Summon using monsters with a different Level from the revealed monster as Xyz Material.
mnst_eff: Once per turn: You can reveal 1 WIND monster in your hand; until the end of your opponent's next turn, neither player can Xyz Summon using monsters with a different Level from the revealed monster as Xyz Material.
